---
title: "Threshold Maps for Infectious Disease Risk"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
setwd("/Users/egepehlivanoglu/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-StockholmUniversity/KVA backup/KVAOneDrive_backup_28Jan2026/2. Projects/4.Cascades/Editorial Review 20250807/map/Anthropocene-maps/6.Infectious_diseases")
source("6.3.histograms.R")
```

# Overview

This report shows maps for the upper tail of the infectious disease risk distribution derived from the Figure 3B workflow.

The maps below retain only the highest values from the histogram distribution:

- top 5%
- top 10%
- top 25%

# Top 5%

```{r top5}
threshold_map_plot(5)
```

# Top 10%

```{r top10}
threshold_map_plot(10)
```

# Top 25%

```{r top25}
threshold_map_plot(25)
```
